title: Philby task-state object
description: Core domain object carried by the agent across long-lived objectives. The agent emits domain events into `evidence[]` and advances `plan[].state` and `status` as work proceeds.

goal.description: User-defined objective, stated as a single sentence.

given.description: Preconditions and inputs the task assumes.

when.description: Permissions granted to the agent for this task.

then.description: Success criteria, typically Make targets that must pass.

status.description: Lifecycle state of the whole task.

plan.description: Ordered steps. Each has an independent state.

evidence.description: Append-only log of domain events emitted by the agent.
